# Let's Get REAL

> Responsive. Equitable. Adaptive. Learner. Let's Get REAL helps K-12 educators create differentiated lessons, authentic assessments, and AI-proof rubrics in 60 seconds — with built-in ELL, IEP/504, and multilingual audio support.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What Let's Get REAL is and how it helps teachers differentiate instruction.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans for individual educators, yearly subscribers, and school teams.
- [Help Center](/help): Guides and tutorials for using the lesson, assessment, rubric, and audio tools.
- [Sign in](/login): Existing user login.
- [Create account](/register): Sign up for a free trial.

## Optional

- [Terms of Service](/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
